note: SYNTHETIC fixture -- live WebSocket capture was not possible in the sandboxed build environment. Stanza shapes derived from RFC 7395, XEP-0045, XEP-0166/0167, XEP-0030, XEP-0215, and lib-jitsi-meet. MUST be verified against live alpha.jitsi.net traffic. See docs/findings.md.

frames.note: XMPP stream open (RFC 7395)
Server stream open with stream ID
Stream features: SASL ANONYMOUS (no PLAIN, no EXTERNAL)
SASL ANONYMOUS auth (empty initial response)
SASL success
Stream restart after SASL success
New stream open with new stream ID
Post-auth stream features: bind + session required
Resource bind IQ (resource=spike)
Bind result: server assigns full JID
disco#info to XMPP server domain
Server disco#info: extdisco:2 and STUN support reported
frames.data: <iq xmlns="jabber:client" type="result" from="alpha.jitsi.net" to="b2e9f4c1-1234-5678-abcd-ef0123456789@alpha.jitsi.net/spike" id="disco_1"><query xmlns="http://jabber.org/protocol/disco#info"><identity category="server" type="im" name="Prosody XMPP Server"/><feature var="http://jabber.org/protocol/disco#info"/><feature var="http://jabber.org/protocol/disco#items"/><feature var="urn:xmpp:extdisco:2"/><feature var="urn:ietf:rfc:5389"/></query></iq>

frames.note: disco#info to conference (MUC) component
Conference disco#info: lobby and visitors features present
frames.data: <iq xmlns="jabber:client" type="result" from="conference.alpha.jitsi.net" to="b2e9f4c1-1234-5678-abcd-ef0123456789@alpha.jitsi.net/spike" id="disco_2"><query xmlns="http://jabber.org/protocol/disco#info"><identity category="server" type="im" name="Prosody Chatrooms"/><feature var="http://jabber.org/protocol/muc"/><feature var="http://jabber.org/protocol/disco#info"/><feature var="http://jabber.org/protocol/disco#items"/><feature var="http://jitsi.org/lobby"/><feature var="http://jitsi.org/visitors"/></query></iq>

frames.note: XEP-0215 external service discovery (STUN/TURN)
External services: STUN + TURN-TCP-443 + TURNS (credentials are synthetic placeholders for fixture only)
frames.data: <iq xmlns="jabber:client" type="result" from="alpha.jitsi.net" to="b2e9f4c1-1234-5678-abcd-ef0123456789@alpha.jitsi.net/spike" id="extdisco_1"><services xmlns="urn:xmpp:extdisco:2"><service type="stun" host="stun.alpha.jitsi.net" port="3478"/><service type="turn" host="turn.alpha.jitsi.net" port="443" transport="tcp" username="turnuser" password="turnpass"/><service type="turns" host="turn.alpha.jitsi.net" port="443" transport="tcp" username="turnuser" password="turnpass"/></services></iq>

frames.note: XEP-0045 MUC join presence with Jitsi extensions
Self-presence in MUC: status 110 (self) + 100 (public room). Confirms successful join.
Focus (Jicofo) presence: owner/moderator. Media session initiation imminent.
Second participant (Alice) presence with Jitsi-specific extensions
Jingle session-initiate from focus (XEP-0166): classic Jingle with audio+video content, BUNDLE group, ICE-UDP transport, DTLS-SRTP fingerprint.
